---
title: Regression Basics
description: Model relationships between variables.
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
### Learning Objectives

- Interpret slope and intercept in simple linear regression.
- Recognize residuals.
- Avoid causal overclaims.
:::

Regression models a relationship between an explanatory variable and a response
variable.

::: {.formula-box}
Simple linear regression has the form `y = beta_0 + beta_1 x + error`.
:::

::: {.practice-box}
1. What does the slope represent?
2. What is a residual?
3. Why does regression alone not prove causation?
:::
